name: TOP_ASSIGNEES_BY_ORIGIN_TECHCLASS1
description: Top origin by TechnologyClass1 category. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (o:Origin {name: $origin})<-[:ORIGIN_FROM]-(a:Assignee)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(tp:TargetPair)-[:HAS_TECHNOLOGY_CLASS1]->(tc:TechnologyClass1 {name: $technologyclass1})
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count, count(DISTINCT tp) AS targetpair_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, targetpair_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: Which organizations or individuals from US lead in Trans-Bridging Immune Engagers target-pair combinations?
Which organizations or individuals from EU lead in Tumor-Intrinsic Control target-pair combinations?
Which organizations or individuals from China lead in Other Immune-Checkpoint-Related Mechanisms target-pair combinations?
